title: Infracost API keys should not be disclosed
description: In most cases, trust boundaries are violated when a secret is exposed in a source code repository or an uncontrolled deployment environment. Unintended people who don’t need to know the secret might get access to it. They might then be able to use it to gain unwanted access to associated services or resources.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Infracost API key detected. Infracost API keys grant access to the Infracost Cloud Pricing API, which provides infrastructure cost estimation data for Terraform, AWS CloudFormation, Pulumi, and other IaC tools. Exposing this key allows unauthorized parties to query cloud pricing data, potentially revealing infrastructure architecture details and cost information. While the Pricing API doesn't expose sensitive cloud credentials, the API key should be protected to prevent abuse of your Infracost quota and unauthorized cost analysis of your infrastructure. Revoke the exposed key immediately through the Org Settings page in Infracost Cloud at https://dashboard.infracost.io/ and generate a new one. Store API keys securely using environment variables (INFRACOST_API_KEY) or encrypted credential files, and never commit them to version control systems.
